positive: A stylized, abstract jungle biome composition. The central focus is a minimalist, highly contrasted silhouette of a jaguar leaping across stylized ancient ruins. Incorporate bioluminescent flora (exotic lilies, stylized ferns) that glow in deep teal and vibrant cyan against a twilight sky. The composition should feature strong vertical elements and dynamic diagonal lines, suitable for apparel printing. High contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic mixed with photorealism, reminiscent of detailed woodblock prints and silkscreen art. Color palette: Deep indigo, forest green, glowing teal, with warm golden accents. Full-frame, central composition, clean edges, bold silhouettes. --ar 1:1
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, fused fingers, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, duplicate, sketch, cartoon, oil painting, abstract art only
